calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for and with Naomi Robinson.
Sarah Brooks appeared by zoom for Jewish Family & Children's Services (conservator of the beneficiary of the estate Janet Partridge).

Mrs. Eisenberg spoke of the relationship between the administrator and the decedent, explained the work performed and services that were provided by the administrator, the amount of time spent, spoke of the attention to detail on behalf of the administrator when going through the decedent's belongings, etc. Mrs. Brooks stated that she appreciates the administrator's reply and that she is prepared to submit on the issue. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is under submission with the court's intent grant as prayed.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Feder appeared by zoom for and with Naomi Robinson (personal representative/administrator).

Mr. Feder stated that the petition was submitted yesterday. Mrs. Robinson stated that the petition covers from the date of death through December 31, 2023. Status on close of estate is continued to May 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via Zoom, with and for Naomi Robinson, Petitioner.

The court advises of its tentative ruling and that notice issues are being waived. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Jun-01-1991 is admitted to probate. Naomi Robinson is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-22-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
